name: Wallaroo.AI
description: Unified AI inference platform for deploying, serving and monitoring ML models across cloud, on-prem and edge with Rust-based runtime.

seo.title: Wallaroo.AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Wallaroo.AI: Unified AI inference platform for deploying, serving and monitoring ML models across cloud, on-prem and edge with Rust-based runtime.

when_to_use: Deploying ML models to production across multi-cloud environments
Monitoring model drift and performance SLAs in production
Running edge AI inference on IoT and on-premise hardware
Managing full model lifecycle from staging to production rollout

pros: Rust runtime gives real perf wins
review.verdict: A legitimate choice for regulated inference across edge and on-prem, but open alternatives cover most cases.
review.best_for: Regulated enterprises deploying ML to edge and on-prem with central observability
review.not_for: Teams happy with open-source serving like KServe, BentoML or vLLM
